description.zh: 知识蒸馏训练较小的学生模型去匹配较大教师模型的软化输出。软概率携带类别相似性信息，而硬标签不会显露这些信息。
description.en: Knowledge distillation trains a smaller student model to match the softened outputs of a larger teacher. The soft probabilities carry class-similarity information that hard labels do not expose.

notes.zh: 由 legacy generated milestone 批量迁移，展示层默认 preserve-legacy，需后续人工细化 claims 与来源绑定。
notes.en: Batch migrated from generated legacy milestone; presentation defaults to preserve-legacy, with claims and source bindings needing later review.
